notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: JJ Wetherholt singles on a ground ball to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Masyn Winn scores. Nathan Church scores. Victor Scott II scores. JJ Wetherholt scores. Fielding error by right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Church singles on a soft ground ball to shortstop Xander Bogaerts, deflected by pitcher Wandy Peralta. Nathan Church to 2nd. Nathan Church advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Xander Bogaerts.
